title: Amanda Gorman Quote - Inauguration Poem
excerpt: I was so moved by the beautiful words of our nation’s Youth Poet Laureate, Amanda Gorman , during her reading of the inauguration poem, “The Hill We Climb.” I loved the last few lines of the poem and knew I…
body: I was so moved by the beautiful words of our nation’s Youth Poet Laureate, Amanda Gorman, during her reading of the inauguration poem, “The Hill We Climb.” I loved the last few lines of the poem and knew I had to hand letter them! May her words inspire us to always be the light!
